concept: Parenting toddlers: Snacks or tantrums, the eternal dilemma
title: Toddlers Are Why Snacks Vanish and Tantrums Flourish
description:
Ah, parenting toddlers—a delicate balance of chaos and comedy. If you've ever handed over your last bag of gummy bears to stop a Category 5 tantrum, you understand the struggle. This design captures the universal truths of life with tiny humans who can't decide if they love you, hate you, or just really need more crackers. Perfect for: 1. Moms and dads surviving snack-based negotiations daily, 2. Anyone who lives in a home where most sentences start with 'Where is?' and end with 'my snack?', 3. Parenting veterans who know 'snack time' is code for '5 minutes of sanity.' DETAILS: Available in a wide range of colors, this bold, witty design features a sharp slogan and snack-themed icons. Made-to-order with clean vector lines and dual-mode palettes to match your unique toddler-taming moments.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
